summary: Iteration 2: End-to-end testing of new WhatsApp Automation feature on top of StyleHub. Backend: 32/32 pytest tests pass (25 legacy regression + 7 new WhatsApp tests covering settings defaults/update, /whatsapp/track happy path & invalid enum, /whatsapp/analytics admin-only + counts increment + top_products + timeline, analytics/summary includes wa fields). Frontend: floating WhatsApp bubble renders on / /products /gallery /contact and hidden on /admin/login and /admin dashboard; product detail (/products/merino-crewneck-sweater) has both data-testid=whatsapp-reserve-cta and whatsapp-inquiry-cta with hrefs starting https://wa.me/, target=_blank, URL-encoded price ₹ (%E2%82%B9), SKU, brand, product URL — hrefs update when size/color change; whatsapp-preview <details> shows composed message correctly; clicking CTAs POSTs /api/whatsapp/track with correct payload (event_type, product_id, sku, size, color, source_url); /admin/settings has all 5 WhatsApp controls + ss-save, toggling floating OFF hides bubble on public page and persists after reload; toggling whatsapp_enabled OFF removes both product CTAs; /admin dashboard shows WhatsApp — last 30 days section with the 4 metrics + wa-top-products list.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to 1150 lines; still recommend splitting into models/, routes/, seed/ modules for maintainability (carried over from iteration 1).

/api/whatsapp/track is fully public and unauthenticated with no rate-limit or captcha — trivial to spam and inflate analytics counts. Consider adding basic IP-based throttling or a signed short-lived token from the frontend.

created_at on whatsapp_events is stored as ISO string; timeline aggregation uses $substr on the string which works but is fragile across timezone/format changes. Prefer storing as BSON datetime and using $dateToString.

Top products aggregation uses $last for product_name/sku which returns an unspecified doc order without a preceding $sort inside the group — practically stable but not guaranteed. Add explicit $sort before $group or use $first with $sort by created_at desc.
seed_data_creation: No manual seed required. whatsapp_events collection is populated on demand via /api/whatsapp/track; tests emit events and clean-up isn't needed (append-only analytics).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 32 backend tests pass via `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. WhatsApp feature verified end-to-end including admin toggles, settings persistence, click tracking POST → analytics counter increment, hidden floating on /admin/*, dynamic href updates on size/color change, and rupee (₹) encoding in wa.me messages. Currency is INR ₹ across UI.
